pattern: Validate the triangle inequality first, then classify by how many of the three side lengths are equal.
hints: A valid triangle needs every pair of sides to sum to more than the third.
Sort the three sides so the inequality check reduces to the two smallest exceeding the largest.
Count distinct side lengths: all equal is equilateral, exactly two equal is isosceles, all different is scalene; otherwise none.

edge_inputs.description: degenerate where two sides exactly equal the third

stress.description: random three sides in small range to hit all branches
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    return [[rng.randint(1, 10), rng.randint(1, 10), rng.randint(1, 10)]]
